0.text: Peripheral and centrally located ground-glass opacities in the upper and lower lobes of both lungs

1.text: Consolidations in the upper and lower lobes of both lungs

2.text: Ground-glass opacities in the middle lobe of the right lung

3.text: Consolidations in the middle lobe of the right lung

4.text: Linear density increases in peripheral areas, especially in the lower lobes
